footer.desc: Dedicated marketer, senior value investor, and AI-driven growth specialist based in Hong Kong. Leveraging technology and data to drive innovation. My Email: fengyuwang1@outlook.com

index.slider1_h1: AI-Driven Market Researcher × Human-Centric Product Practitioner
index.slider1_p: Focused on AI, market strategy, growth planning, and automation collaboration, with a long-term commitment to workflow structuring and process automation. "Think different."
index.slider2_h1: Prompt engineering and automation for smarter customer engagement
index.slider2_p: I use AI and prompt engineering to generate stronger market materials, combine automation with customer touchpoints and service flows, and reduce labor costs while improving efficiency through AI-enabled workflows.
index.about_h2: I am an AI-driven market strategist and human-centered product builder
index.about_p: I hold an MSc in Marketing from HKUST and a law degree from CityUHK, with a minor in Marketing, along with 8+ years of value-investing experience. I am also a full-stack developer working across web, Android, Windows, Python, Java, JavaScript, and automation workflows. I habitually think through problems from the angles of market dynamics, technology, and data, and I am especially good at combining AI, market strategy, automation tools, and collaboration workflows to improve team efficiency and make products fit user needs more closely.
index.about_feature1: EducationHKUSTCityUHK LawMarketing
index.about_feature2: ResearchMarket ResearchValue InvestingData Analysis
index.about_feature3: CoreAIFull-StackAutomation
index.service1_p: Utilizing generative AI and prompt engineering to optimize marketing workflows and drive growth.
index.service2_p: Data-driven decision making through advanced analytics, consumer insights, and research.
index.service3_p: Developing comprehensive brand identities and strategic positioning for global markets. Make Variations for brands.
index.service4_p: Proficient in fundamental and technical analysis across Mainland China, HK, and US markets.
index.service5_p: Integrating cutting-edge technology and digital tools to streamline multi-disciplinary tasks.
index.service6_p: Deep understanding of youth cohorts and urban cultural diversity to guide product decisions.
